summary:
OLYMPIC OPENING CEREMONY VISIONS: Brandon discusses his visions concerning an opening ceremony, describing it as a dark event that involved the summoning of demonic spirits and the spirit of Hitler linked to World War II. He recounts seeing a green finger tapping onyx black tablets featuring demonic writing, which he identifies as ancient spells. Brandon asserts that the ceremony utilized an arch monument connected to the Holocaust, referencing past teachings by Rick Renner, to subtly broadcast a satanic ritual. He further claims that a pentagram was visible in a ball of fire and that the stage featured hypnotic portals resembling a Stargate or CERN technology.

GEOPOLITICAL PREDICTIONS AND FALSE FLAGS: Brandon details an escalation in global conflicts, specifically warning of an impending major world war involving Iran and Syria. He anticipates a sudden, surprise attack in the middle of the night related to Israel. Additionally, Brandon predicts upcoming domestic false flag events and the exposure of political corruption in California, Oregon, and Washington ahead of the midterms. He highlights a hack of the Epstein list, claiming that leaked codes and three million emails are just the beginning of greater embarrassing exposures for politicians.

SHIFTING SPIRITUAL GIFTS AND MIRACULOUS CLAIMS: Brandon explains that his spiritual gifts are evolving to include physical healings and manifestations of divine glory. He provides an example of delivering a prophetic word to an elderly woman in church, telling her that her bones would grow stronger to reverse a negative medical report she had recently received. Brandon expresses an expectation for a season of creative miracles, such as the regeneration of body parts, restored teeth, and healed facial features damaged by drug abuse, emphasizing that these events will serve as signs and wonders for an end-time harvest.

PROPHETIC VISIONS OF REVIVAL AND ANGELIC VISITATIONS: Brandon describes a vision of a pink and purple Shekinah glory cloud resting over the Mabee Center, accompanied by angelic visitations. He states that angels will clap their wings together to create a mighty rushing wind that physically moves people's hair. Brandon forecasts a major revival featuring tangible manifestations of glory, including gold dust on skin and fragrant oil droplets smelling like honeysuckle. He anticipates these manifestations spreading to unexpected locations, including cars, parks, schools, and local churches like Living Word in Minnesota, as well as theaters in Branson, Missouri.

SUPERNATURAL EXPERIENCES AND GLOBAL AWAKENING: Brandon claims that there will be a surge of supernatural translations where individuals are given glimpses of both heaven and hell to serve as a witness to others. He asserts that Muslims, Buddhists, and non-believing Christians will experience sudden conversions similar to the Road to Damascus. Brandon also calls for a global revival stretching across nations such as Iran, Cuba, North Korea, Canada, and various American cities, predicting that the people of Iran will be liberated from their current government.

CULTURAL AND POLITICAL PRAYER TARGETS: Brandon targets specific political and cultural figures in his declarations, seeking protection and wisdom for Donald Trump concerning his handling of international relations. He issues calls for a nationwide economic turnaround, the supernatural cancellation of personal debts such as mortgages and student loans, and the restoration of struggling marriages. Additionally, Brandon directs his focus toward the entertainment industry, naming figures like the Kardashians, Justin Bieber, Hailey Bieber, Jelly Roll, and Mel Gibson as targets for a spiritual awakening. He also references a previous vision he had concerning a skier going downhill, which he connects to Lindsey Vonn's recent injury, and mentions warnings regarding experiments conducted in Nevada biolabs.
rawData: [February 10, 2026]-[The Glory of the Lord like we've never seen before is coming - Are you ready]-[https://youtu.be/OmFxbr3D8Gk]-[Hey, good morning family. Praise the Lord. Thank you for joining us again today. Well, I haven't been with you since the opening ceremonies. I did the video on Thursday and I've taken some time to pray and seek the Lord. Everything the Lord showed us concerning the opening ceremony was very dark. He said it would be conjuring up old Hitler spirits and old demonic ties. I saw the green finger. Does anybody remember that? I saw the green finger on Thursday and it tapped the tablet three times. I don't remember if I told you all this publicly or not. It was pointing to demonic writing on onyx black tablets. I believe it was conjuring. If I don't say the right English word, folks, I'm sorry. I try really hard to use bigger words, but I'm not really educated when it comes to stuff like that. I have to ask Diana what some things even mean. But I'm going to tell you when I say 'summoning,' they're summoning the old demonic spirits. I'm saying they're trying to rebirth it—rebirth the Hitler spirit that was on the nations that brought forth World War II through sacrifice of humans and all these other things. I saw it in the spirit and the Lord showed it to me. So I'm just trying to relay to you that they're conjuring up whatever word you want to use. I saw them doing satanic practices, bringing forth old spells and old things through ancient tablets in Europe—things that they have found that are old demonic ties. And the Lord said, 'Watch the Olympics opening ceremony.' I have heard Rick Renner preach about that arch. Does anybody have it? Comment down below if you have ever heard Rick Renner's sermon concerning the arch and what he said it represented concerning Hitler and the Holocaust and things like that. I don't want to misquote a man of God like that who is that educated. He is so astute, a very educated man about the Greek. I remember I even talked to Pastor Candace and other people that I've known. I've asked, 'Do you remember anybody teaching this?' because I thought it was Sister Billye Brim, because she teaches a lot of eschatology, end-time teachings and things like that, or it was Hilton Sutton or one of them. I was thinking no, it was Rick Renner, and I reached out through his thing trying to find the sermon. I can't find it. So if you know where that sermon is and it talks about the arch, the arch is where they did the satanic practice. They put that ball there and said, 'Oh, it didn't mean anything.' They're not going to come out and say, 'This is devil worship' on the screen, folks. They're coming out as subtle as they can. But you can't be too subtle if you have any kind of spiritual discernment at all. Anybody who has eyes to see is going to see what that was. And that was dark. You could feel the occult all around it. Like I said, if you didn't feel it, then I would check your wood because it's probably very wet. It was very dark. You could see the fire and all the stuff and that was some kind of ceremony regardless of what they say. Don't fool yourself. They lit it on fire. The pentagram shooting and doing all that—if you freeze-frame it, you could see the pentagram of the devil symbol right in that ball as it was going up. But where were they doing it? In that arch that had to do with the Holocaust and the things to do with what Rick Renner taught about years ago concerning the Jews and the Jewish culture. It's not a coincidence they picked that monument with the arch. That's not normal. Why did they pick that? It was closest to Rome, closest to these places where we see this demonic display coming before the people as a summoning to the demonic. Now, I know I use words that are probably not in the English vocabulary, but it's a conjuring up, a summoning of demonic spirits to bring forth World War II. We saw President Trump have an emergency meeting with Bibi in Israel right at the White House this week. Major things, escalation of things concerning Iran. I believe we're on the verge of something major taking place with Iran—the Valley of Decision, all that's coming to a head. If this kicks off into a major world war with Iran and other nations like Syria, the surprise attack... I went into heavy intercession praying for Israel in a surprise attack in the middle of the night. We keep seeing the surprise attack in the middle of the night. What is this? What are these major false flag events? And you say, 'Brandon, what is that?' I told you I saw the Illuminati. I've told you I've seen dark men and women trying to distract from the Epstein list. Another thing I thought was interesting: Diana got this email from somebody who said, 'Did you see that the Epstein list got hacked into?' I said, 'Was it anonymous?' They found Pam Bondi leaked the codes on accident—supposedly put the codes out to Epstein's list, his Apple account, and all his stuff. They redacted it or whatever, but they were saying it got leaked, his passcodes. So somebody got in and was able to look through things in depth that weren't redacted. I thought, 'Is this anonymous? Is this part of what the Lord showed us, that greater embarrassing moments concerning politicians would come out in the days ahead?' Things that wouldn't be blacked out to expose the darkness, but a ransom of over $40 million. There were things that I saw. And the Lord said to me, 'This is just the beginning. The three million emails that were leaked is just the beginning.' I truly believe we're going to see more of that in the days ahead—more things exposed concerning California and the corruption there, concerning Oregon and Washington across this nation going into the midterms. We have what, nine months left until the midterms? Maybe ten? We're coming down to the countdown of nine months left until the midterms are here. It's coming quick, and it's amazing to me how time flies. We're already almost halfway through February. Another thing I thought was interesting about the opening ceremony is the Lord kept talking about portals. The little thing that was on the ground they kept focusing on looked like a portal. Then when the countries walked through it, it looked like a portal. This was the same thing I told you—focus on what was going on with CERN portals. I said this is like Stargate. Stargate exists; there's some kind of portal they're tampering with that will be for demonic purposes. I thought it was interesting that all the countries walked through the ring and it looked like Stargate. Then what was on the ground looked like a portal. It looked like a hypnotic wheel. It looked very hypnotic to me. If you look at it while it spins, they kept focusing on the center of it and they had those whatever those things were running around. As we see the closing ceremony in two weeks, I'm curious to see what happens. The 250 years... and President Trump calling for that prayer breakfast on May 17th to have a National Day of Prayer and rededication of the nation of America back to God, calling this one nation under God. He's in that valley of decision. You know what's been interesting, y'all? I'll tell you this before we go to pray. The Lord said to me privately, 'You're going to start to walk in a different type of gift; it is going to start to change a little bit on your life for healings, demonstrations, and manifestations of glory.' As I've been going along, I'll be walking by somebody and the Lord will download and tell me immediately what they're going through and how they're overcoming in their body. Or somebody asks me for prayer and I'll touch them, and the Lord will show me more about what's going on deeper in their body, in their hearts, and all kinds of things. It's been very interesting, and unless I'm underneath that anointing and that cloak comes on me—as I said, if it's not there, it's not there—I don't use him; he uses me. I've said that just like Kathryn Kuhlman said it a thousand times: 'I don't use him; he uses me.' Even in this video, I'm just waiting on him. I'll wait on the glory. I wait on the presence of the Lord. But it's been interesting; it will come on like a light switch when I'm just walking by and the Lord says, 'That person right there can't sleep at night. Pray for them.' And I go, 'What? Really?' So I say, and they go, 'That's exactly right.' And it's happening, and it's been interesting. As I have gone through the last couple of weeks, it's increasing, and it's not that I turn it on, but when it turns on by the Holy Ghost, he just tells me things. It's been interesting how it's been evolving—I hate to even use the word 'evolving' because that's not a good word—going from glory to glory. That's a better word; it's going from glory to glory, and it's been amazing to watch the hand of the Lord concerning things. Even as I was saying, there was a lady sitting where we were attending church. She was an elderly woman, and I was clear across the auditorium, and the Lord said, 'Do you see that lady? I want you to give her a word after church service.' He said, 'Tell her her bones are going to get stronger,' and gave details about her personal health and all this stuff. So I was walking out of the church service because I was trying to get out quick, and the Lord said, 'You didn't do what I told you to do.' I said, 'What did you tell me to do? Oh yeah, the lady.' So I ran over there and I said, 'The Lord told me to tell you...' She goes, 'I got a bad doctor's report concerning my bones on Friday.' She goes, 'Wow.' It was to reverse the curse. You understand? The doctor had a bad report, but God had a better one. You're going to live long and finish strong, and your bones are going to get stronger. Things are going to start happening to your health. There was more to the word, but that's not for the public. I thought it was interesting how the gift of the Lord that he's put on me started to change. As we see in these last days, he's going to use signs and wonders to really help the people. I truly believe we're entering into a time of the greatest harvest of souls this world has ever seen. But he wants us all strong. He wants us the whole man—spiritually, physically, mentally, emotionally, financially—the whole man, so that we finish strong. Right now, there's not been a lot of stuff I've seen, especially in America, with creative miracles and things like that. So I'm believing God for the beginning stages of what he said to me since I've been a kid: creative miracles, healings, and signs and wonders will follow them that believe. So it's exciting. I'm excited to see first the blade, then the ear, then the full manifestation. I believe we're starting to see some fruit of this. And that's why I wanted to tell y'all I was excited about it. So all glory to God. All that we say in word and in deed, we give all to the glory of God. And so we've been listening to Kathryn Kuhlman and listening to our faith teachings, stirring ourselves up and seeking him during this time. I'm just thankful that you all show up and want to pray with me. That's what I had for you. I try not to make the videos redundant. I look back at some of the old videos I've done and criticize my own videos, but I want it to always be a place of refreshing, that we're not making a video just to make a video, but that this is a place where you can come and get a drink spiritually—get refreshed for your week, for your day, for your hour, or whatever you're going through—and just walk away and say, 'Man, I feel better about my life today. Not by what Brandon did, but by the Holy Spirit leading us.' I'm so thankful that he would use us in these last days. That's why I told Braden—we've gone over our videos a lot this last week—did it attract, whenever it was accurate about the Olympics, to Jesus or did it attract to us? I always want to deflect. We have this treasure in earthen vessels, that the excellency of the power may be of him and not of us. Regardless of what you see and what we say or whatever is on the news, it's always to give God glory. I need you to know that over and over again. This is about Brandon decreasing and the Holy Spirit increasing, so that you realize he wants to do something amazing in your life. Every single time I come on here, it's always to lead you to Jesus and to the cross, to tell you that God loves you and has a plan for your life. It's not about how Brandon has this or that. I'm telling you, if you realize how much I deal with my own stuff—and I'm sure there's a lot of you who go, 'Yeah, we can see it'—whatever, I just want to let you all know that we're all a work in progress. I'm so grateful. I take this time and just dedicate it to him. I go back to what was the fruit of the channel in the first place. What did he tell us to do? Teach people to pray. Pray with the people. Tell them something encouraging. Teach them about anointing their house with oil. Teach them that there's a heaven to gain and a hell to shun. You know, how much can I relay to you where we are in these end times? To yell at the top of my lungs that Jesus Christ is coming. As you see the signs of the times in the fig tree right now, all around you, my goodness, folks, wake up and look around us. The signs of the times are accelerating at such a rapid pace, it's almost hard for me to believe. And I'm the one telling you it's coming; it shocked me and my wife and my kids. Another thing I thought was interesting: do you remember I said I saw the three going down the mountain? Lindsey Vonn fell and broke her leg. Her number was 13. I didn't see the 13; I saw a three, and it was purple, and I saw it on the downhill. I said something will happen going downhill. I saw her number is 13 on her outfits. But I saw the number three, and the Lord kept talking to me about February and these things, and I knew it had something to do with the Olympics. I hear in part and see in part, and I've learned not to add to or take away from anything. But whenever I'm talking to you, I try to work it out in my mind. What did we see? Number three, we saw this 13, the skiing down the hill, and then that girl had to be medically evacuated because she messed her leg up so bad. And I thought that's kind of interesting, you know? I don't know. Where are we with all that? I pray over these things and like I said, I go down these trails with things and pray. I heard one prophetic person talk about Candace Owens and the things about her opening doors. There are so many different things that we've heard over the last year or two years, and you start to see them in the news. It's happening so quickly that after a while you go, 'Does anybody else see how quickly things are happening and escalating with wars and rumors of wars, the plagues, and things happening?' The biolabs in Nevada with all the stuff, where he was injecting stuff with mice and doing all the things he was doing, and I thought, 'Where have we heard this for biolabs? The Lord's told us about biolabs.' I just go, 'God, I'm so thankful that you would want to talk to me and tell us what's coming regardless of what we see right now.' It kind of makes your flesh squirm a little bit, but I keep my eyes... I listened to Kathryn Kuhlman today and she said, 'Don't focus on tomorrow. Just focus on today, for tomorrow will overwhelm you. You only have the anointing to get through today because God's given you and graced you for today. Enjoy your wife. Enjoy your husband. Enjoy your kids. Enjoy your grandkids. Enjoy what God has given you in the moment.' So, let's go tubing for a little bit. We'll pray. And if the Lord doesn't show us anything, I don't know if he will. Like I said, I don't use him, he uses me. So, let's pray and we'll just take communion. I always like to do that with y'all. Thank you for your support. Thank you for being here. And let's take communion. Let's pray and let's just seek him for everything that he has for us today. Father, I thank you, Lord, for your body that was broken for us. Lord, we're so grateful that by your stripes we're healed. You were wounded for our transgressions. You were bruised for our iniquities. The chastisement of our peace was upon you, and with your stripes, we're healed. And we take this body in the name of Jesus and we lift it up before you, Father. And we thank you, Father, that we are in the last of the last days. Father, we're looking up for our redemption draws nigh and we're healed and whole and well. And as we start to flow in the end-time giftings, as we start to see the signs and wonders follow them that believe, we're so grateful. I'm so excited, Father, for what we're about to see for healings and demonstrations and manifestations, raising of the dead, casting out devils, and seeing what you said—the Great Commission—walking in the fullness of it. Thank you, Father, for all that you've given us. Thank you, Lord, for all that you have provided for us, for creative ideas to get wealth, teaching us to go from glory to glory. Father, it's the love of money that's the root of all evil, not money itself; it's the love of it. And Father, I thank you, Lord, that you bless us in the city and the field, coming in and going out. Father, everything we put our hands to will prosper today, and we lack no good thing. Give us creative ideas. Give us favor where there was no favor. Open doors that would never open unless you touched it, and close doors if we're trying to open the wrong one. Father, I thank you, Lord, that the footsteps of the righteous are ordered of you concerning buying houses, concerning land, concerning all of it—that we always are in the right place at the right time, doing exactly what we're supposed to do for the end-time harvest. Father, I take this body in the name of Jesus. We lift it up before you, and we thank you, Father, for what you did for us in Jesus' name. Lord, we take the blood and we apply the blood. We apply the blood and we make much of the blood, and the blood makes much of us. I apply the blood in the name of Jesus. And we thank you, Father, that no weapon formed against us will prosper. Every tongue that rises against us, we condemn it. And Father, I thank you that the angels of the Lord are camped around and about us, that they bear us up in their hands lest we dash our foot against a stone. I thank you, Father, that we have eyes to see what the Holy Spirit's wanting to show us. We hear your voice, and a stranger's voice we will not follow. The greater one lives on the inside of us. We apply the blood; as he is, so are we in this world. And we take the blood right now. And we thank you, Lord. We make much of that blood. Amen and amen. Do you believe it? Thank you, Lord. I thank you, Father. The signs will follow them that believe. We believe. We're believing believers and we're not doubters. We're overcomers and we thank you, Lord. What can wash away my sin? Nothing but the blood of Jesus. What can make me whole again? Nothing but the blood of Jesus. The blood, Father. We make much of the blood today. It never loses its power. We thank you, Lord, that it reaches to the highest mountain and it flows to the lowest valley. Oh, the blood that gives me strength from day to day, it will never lose its power. Only believe. Only believe. All things are possible. Only believe. Lord, I believe. Lord, I believe. All things are possible. Lord, I believe. I see something. Only believe; all things are possible when you only believe. Lord, I believe. Lord, I believe. All things are possible. Lord, I believe. Only believe. All things are possible when you only believe. Rise and be healed in the name of Jesus. Let faith arise in your soul. Rise and be healed in the name of Jesus. It's interesting when I was singing that just a second ago, I saw the Mabee Center with a cloud around it. And I saw a cloud that looked like a donut with a hole in the middle of it. But it was a cloud that was a Shekinah glory cloud that was resting on the Mabee Center again. It looked like it had lightning in it, but it was pink and purple like a sunset. And inside of this cloud was thick, like I said, it looked like a side of a donut. But inside of the center of this, it went around the whole Mabee Center. And in the middle of it was a complete void with a cloud wrapped around. And it was resting on the building. And you can feel the glory looking at it. As I was singing that song, 'Only Believe,' and I thought, 'This will be a sign, won't it, Lord? This will be a sign when this manifests on the building just right above the atmosphere above it. People will take pictures of it, won't they?' Healings and demonstrations and manifestations. The old wells of revival are coming uncapped. Oral Roberts' tent meeting healing anointing is coming back but through different people this time. Oh Lord, I want to be used. I'll help you. Only believe. All things are possible. Only believe. There'll be angelic visitations when this happens. And you'll hear the sound of the wings in the auditorium as they blow. They'll flap their wings and the presence of the Lord will bring in an ushering of a mighty rushing wind. As the angels of the Lord, I see them all around in a circle. I see them flapping their wings, and as they clasp them together, the wings of the angels of the Lord are flapping. They're touching, but when they touch, it makes a sound like a clap, as if you would clap your hands; their wings are clapping. They're swinging like this, and when they do, they're creating a wind of the spirit all throughout the auditorium—a sound of a mighty rushing wind. When it does, it will swirl in the atmosphere and it will actually blow people's hair. I've seen this before; it will blow their hair. When you see people falling down, they're clapping their wings. But remember whenever I say I saw the wind of the spirit moving their hair as a whirlwind on the individuals—instead of all these people falling down and you see them fall out in the glory, not knowing if it's a courtesy fall or not—I see a whirlwind whipping people and even the women's hair again. I see it again. It will be as the angels are moving their wings and clapping them together, and the glory of the Lord is going to fill the house and the auditorium with the glory of the Lord. And the Lord said, "I will visit the auditoriums, these mega auditoriums like the Mabee Center Center and other facilities of sporting events—the glory events—but I will fill the churches and the Shekinah glory will come like gold dust on their skin. It will be not something that they've imitated or that is artificial or fake, but this will be a real sign of my glory, bringing the residue of the anointing of the Holy Ghost upon the people. There has been authentic in the past, but there have been copycats too that are fake, but you will see a great manifestation of the glory on people's skin like shining gold, almost like glitter. I'm looking at the church again. I see the church in Minnesota, Living Word. He's about to do something major in Living Word with the new pastor, and even with the younger people. I see a major revival that has been cultivated in prayer. The Lord is about to lift the veil, and all the hindrances in the spirit are being removed. You say, 'Well, why haven't we seen it yet?' It's like a curtain before a show begins—whenever you go and see the Nutcracker or a play, you see the curtain lifted back and it's about to begin. I don't know how else to describe it, but it's thick and it's beautiful and it's red and it has gold at the bottom. In this, a major move of God is about to hit the churches and it'll be his last call. This is my last call. This is the goodness of God that brings men to repentance, for I am giving one last call, and the greatest demonstration and manifestation of my glory will be upon the auditorium of great cultivation of prayer. For behold, I will do a new thing, and there will be oil on the people—droplets—not fake things that people try to do as a gimmick, but there will be true droplets of oil. I hear droplets of rain out of nowhere. There will be Holy Ghost oil on people's skin and their hair. Like someone taking a leaf or a tree that has a lot of rain in it and shaking a bush, and the droplets come down—this is what it's like. It will be on their skin, their body, and their clothes. The glory and the healing power of the Lord will be there, and it will smell like a fragrance from heaven. The oil will have its own fragrance, like the Rose of Sharon. I smell the fragrance of the glory of honeysuckle. They'll be trying to scrape it off their skin to bottle it, and there'll be flakes of gold dust in it. I see it by the spirit of God right now. The Lord said, 'I'm going to visit the auditoriums. I'm going to visit the people. I'm going to visit them in the streets, in the schools, and in your car.' You'll be driving down the road and the glory of the Lord will surround your car. Those that are around, even at the stoplights, will see and experience the glory as you pull up. The glory of the Lord will radiate out of your car into the windows of those around you. A sweet fragrance will fill the atmosphere even at the stoplights. People will see that God is good and God is love and that he's come to set the captives free. Even in this modern day where sin abounds, grace does much more abound. You're about to see the glorious church rise. As you're worshiping in your car, it'll feel like glorious clouds in your car. You'll be driving down the road and the glory will come out and people will say, 'What is that?' It's the glory. You'll be in the park having a church service and the glory will fall; people will be lying out all over the place. Ask me and I'll do it. Nothing is off the table. Ask me according to my word and I'll do it—healings, creative miracles. Unusual things. You're looking just for the blinded eyes, but I will do exceedingly abundantly above all you dare ask or think. Ask me for it. Signs will follow them that believe: creative miracles. The glory is here. As you speak it, it will manifest in front of your face. As you decree it out of your mouth, it will manifest. The Lord says today, 'Say it and believe me for bigger.' It will line up with my word. Don't get off into Flakyville. It lines up with my word. He said, 'Clarify that.' You say, 'I'm believing for a car; I'm going to speak a Ferrari in front of my face and it's going to be there.' Don't be disrespectful. I'm talking about creative miracles, demonstrations of the glory. I sing praises to your name, oh Lord. Heavenly sounds of worship. You're going to hear angels sing with you as you're in the services. I will allow you to hear into the next realm. As you are singing, the atmosphere will change and the glory of the Lord will fill it. I will allow your ears to hear the angel choirs singing with you and the saints, the great cloud of witnesses, the sound of worship from heaven. As the glory fills, you will literally hear and feel as on earth as it is in heaven. You'll hear the sound of heaven on earth. You'll feel the atmosphere shift. The glory of the Lord will fill your house, the glory of the Lord will fill the temple, the glory of the Lord will fill the school, and you will know. You will taste and see that the Lord is good. Nothing is off-limits concerning healing. Do you understand creative miracles? That's more than a healing. A healing is amazing, but creative miracles are creative signs and wonders. Some people say, 'Well, I believe for healing,' but you need a miracle. To see an arm grow back is a miracle; that's not a healing. To have a brand new heart, new body parts, new things. Do not become familiar with the glory to the point where you take it for granted and say, 'Oh, it's just another glorious service.' Oh, who cares? Honor it and respect it as a treasure. Treasure it with great honor and great glory. Oh Father, we worship you for even the hangnail being healed. We give you praise for the thumbnail being healed. We give you praise for that's what it was in Azusa Street. I'm telling you, Azusa Street doesn't have nothing on what we're about to see. Azusa Street was nothing compared to what we're about to see. I'm telling you—you think porcelain veneers are all—they've got rotted teeth. God's going to restore their teeth, grow new teeth in their heads, noses that were eaten up by drug abuse restored back on their faces. You think rhinoplasty? God has better rhinoplasty than anybody you could ever imagine. Pop new ears, new eyes, new whatever you've got. I'm telling you by the spirit of God, it's time to believe him for bigger. Ask me for big. Oh Father, we thank you Lord for the glory. Thank you, Father, for the manifestations. I see the churches, Father. I see the tents. There have been so many Pharisees that have tried to hold it back. So many legalistic Pharisees in the church that will try to hold it back. I will deal with the false religion.
